revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:稲根神社 (御蔵島村)]] {{Expand Japanese|稲根神社 (御蔵島村)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Inane Shrine | native_name = 稲根神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Inane Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|33.894611|139.593389}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Inane Shrine'''|稲根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135038714|ltq=Q135038714|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135419779|ltq=Q135419779|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province|ja|伊豆国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 6 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039638|ltq=Q135039638|qid=Q135039638|1=Sakitamahimeno- Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Azusawakenomikoto Shrine|lt=Azusawakenomikoto Shrine|ja|阿豆佐和気命神社|qid=Q134926700|1=Azusawake-no-Mikoto Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q1354993|ltq=Q1354993|qid=Q1354993|1=Mikurajima, Tokyo}} * {{ill|Q860928|ltq=Q860928|qid=Q860928|1=Izu Province}} * {{ill|Kamo District, Shizuoka|lt=Kamo district|ar|مقاطعة كامو (شيزوكا)|ceb|Kamo-gun (distrito sa Hapon, Shizuoka-ken)|en|Kamo District, Shizuoka|fa|ناحیه کامو، شیزوئوکا|fr|District de Kamo (Shizuoka)|id|Distrik Kamo, Shizuoka|it|Distretto di Kamo (Shizuoka)|ja|賀茂郡|ko|가모군 (시즈오카현)|pl|Powiat Kamo (Shizuoka)|ru|Камо (Сидзуока)|uk|Повіт Камо (Сідзуока)|zh|賀茂郡|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|33.894611|139.593389}} == time of earliest written record (P1249) == * {'time': '+0850-00-00T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 9, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985786'}http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/7285/ == OpenCorporates ID (P1320) == * jp/5010005012150 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181574 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11504610|ltq=Q11504610|qid=Q11504610|1=Unranked}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == TripAdvisor ID (P3134) == * 8150724 == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5010005012150 == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Inane Shrine (Haiden)|lt=Inane Shrine (Haiden)|qid=Q135192726|1=Inane Shrine (Haiden)}} ** P1352: {'amount': '+1', 'unit': '1'} ** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135192727|ltq=Q135192727|qid=Q135192727|1=Inane Shrine (Honden)}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P1352: {'amount': '+2', 'unit': '1'} ** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '東京都御蔵島村', 'language': 'ja'} == located in/on physical feature (P706) == * {{ill|Q1197235|ltq=Q1197235|qid=Q1197235|1=Mikura-jima}} [[JA:稲根神社 (御蔵島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q110915761}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = {{ruby|Inane Shrine|いなねじんじゃ|}} |画像= [[File:Inane Shrine on Mikurajima Island-crop.jpg|250px]]
Shrine torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|qid=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Mikurajima Village|Q1354993|qid=Q1354993|1=Mikurajima, Tokyo}} |位置 = {{Coord|33|53|40.6|N|139|35|36.2|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Itatewake-no-Mikoto (いたてわけのみこと) |社格 = former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Inane Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|33|53|40.6|N|139|35|36.2|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|33|53|40.6|N|139|35|36.2|E}}}} }} '''Inane Shrine''' (いなねじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Mikurajima Village|Q1354993|qid=Q1354993|1=Mikurajima, Tokyo}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|qid=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. The shrine near the settlement is the haiden; the honden (okumiya) is in Inanegamori, about 4 {{ill|lt=kilometers|Q828224|qid=Q828224|1=Kilometre}} to the {{ill|lt=south|Q667|qid=Q667|1=South}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. However, since it is identified with the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} “Itatewake-no-Mikoto Shrine,” it is presumed to have existed at least by the {{ill|lt=Engi|Q1374325|qid=Q1374325|1=Engi (era)}} era ({{ill|lt=901|Q23580|qid=Q23580|1=901}}-{{ill|lt=923|Q30108|qid=Q30108|1=923}}). According to tradition, long ago people noticed a shining object on Mt. Inane every night, and when they approached they found a {{ill|lt=mirror|Q35197|qid=Q35197|1=Mirror}} hanging on a tree. They then founded a shrine using the mirror as {{ill|lt=shintai|Q327532|qid=Q327532|1=Shintai}}; this became the origin of the shrine[http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/7285/ 稲根神社] Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines. The shrine holds works by Taga Chōko (later {{ill|lt=Hanabusa Itchō|Q3109209|qid=Q3109209|1=Hanabusa Itchō}}), who was once {{ill|lt=exiled|Q1770529|qid=Q1770529|1=Penal transportation}} to {{ill|lt=Miyake-jima|Q1075076|qid=Q1075076|1=Miyake-jima}}: “Panel painting of sacred horse” and “Panel painting of Ōmori Hikoshichi”Tokyo Historical Education Research Society (ed.), ''Historical Walks in Tokyo, Vol.2 (Historical Walk 13): Tama and Islands'', Yamakawa Shuppansha, 2005, p.248. Since access to the honden (okumiya) is only via {{ill|lt=mountain trail|Q913398|qid=Q913398|1=Mountain trail}}, a guide is required[https://tamashima.tokyo/mikurashima/2018/article001-3.html Why Mikurajima is called a miracle island: severe yet beautiful forest-and-sea experience] Tokyo Convention & Visitors Bureau “TAMASHIMA.tokyo”. === Cultural properties === *Panel painting of sacred horse, by Taga Chōko (Hanabusa Itchō) (Tokyo-designated tangible cultural property, designated Feb 21, Shōwa 32)[https://bunkazai.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/jp/search_detail.html?page=1&id=231 板絵着色神馬図額 多賀朝湖（英一蝶）筆] Tokyo *Panel painting of Ōmori Hikoshichi, by Taga Chōko (Hanabusa Itchō) (Tokyo-designated tangible cultural property, designated Feb 21, Shōwa 32)[https://bunkazai.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/jp/search_detail.html?page=1&id=232 板絵着色大森彦七図額 多賀朝湖（英一蝶）筆] Tokyo *Panel painting of islanders’ daily life and labor (Tokyo-designated tangible cultural property, designated Feb 21, Shōwa 32)[https://bunkazai.metro.tokyo.lg.jp/jp/search_detail.html?page=1&id=456 板絵着色島民生活労働図額] Tokyo === Access === *15 minutes on foot from Mikurajima Port (to the haiden). === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === *Tokyo Historical Education Research Society (ed.), ''Historical Walks in Tokyo, Vol.2 (Historical Walk 13): Tama and Islands'', Yamakawa Shuppansha, 2005 === External links === * [http://www.tokyo-jinjacho.or.jp/tosho/7285/ 稲根神社] - Tokyo Association of Shinto Shrines {{Pref-stub|pref=東京都}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Inane Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Inane Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:御蔵島村の建築物]] [[Category:御蔵島村の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokyo]]
